feedback.text: Hi there, As someone who grew up in the 2000's i am sad that alot of current games, especially those that purely exist as online multiplayer games are in great risk of being lost forever. There are currently no regulations for these types of games that prevent the publishers from sunsetting the games forever and making them inaccessible. Especially for the consumers that spent alot of money supporting a game that they now no longer have access too. I would love for regulation that require publishers to have an End of life plan for these types of games that make them accessible to the conusmers who loved the.
